name: seedance
description: Plan and produce short videos with Seedance, including TikTok story scenes, cast-reference libraries, and external audio/subtitle handoff.

interface.longDescription: A generic short-video workflow for planning, image-to-video prompting, cast-reference selection, TikTok story scenes, external voice-over/subtitle handoff, reviewing, and packaging Seedance videos with rights, budget, retry, and delivery guardrails.
defaultPrompt: Plan a short video with Seedance.
Plan a TikTok story video using a cast reference library.
Review a Seedance video brief before generation.
